signin.page_description: Sign in to your account to access the application
signin.error_email_not_verified: Your email address is not verified.
signin.error_try_again: Sign in failed. Please try again.

signup.page_description: Sign up to get access to the application
signup.success_message: Account created successfully. A verification email has been sent.
signup.error_try_again: Form submission failed. Please try again.

verify_email.page_description: Your account is not yet verified. Check your inbox or request a new verification link.
verify_email.success_message: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
verify_email.error_message: Error sending email. Please try again.

email_verified.page_description: Your email address has been successfully verified! You can now sign in to your account.

invitation.page_description: You were invited by {userName} to join the organization {orgName} as {role}.
invitation.confirm_message: You are about to join the organization. Confirm your choice.
invitation.must_signin: You must be signed in to accept this invitation.
invitation.success_accepted_activate: Invitation accepted. Activate the organization from the menu if needed.
invitation.error_cannot_accept: Cannot accept invitation at the moment
invitation.error_cannot_reject: Cannot reject invitation at the moment

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

password.min_length: Password must contain at least 8 characters
password.lowercase_required: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.uppercase_required: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.digit_required: Password must contain at least one digit

name.min_length: Name must contain at least 2 characters

organization_name.pattern: Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces or dashes
organization_name.min_length: Name must contain at least 2 characters
organization_name.min_alphanumeric: Name must contain at least two alphanumeric characters

confirmation.email_required: You must enter your email address to confirm
confirmation.email_mismatch: The entered email address does not match your account.
confirmation.org_name_required: You must enter the organization name to confirm
confirmation.org_name_mismatch: The entered name does not match the active organization.

settings.page_description: Modify your personal information and account preferences.
settings.name_description: This name will be displayed in your profile.
settings.reconnect_message: Please sign in again to access your settings.

danger_zone.card_description: Deleting your account is irreversible. You will lose access to all your data and all organizations. Enter your email address to confirm.
danger_zone.warning_title: This action is final and will delete all your personal data and access to all organizations.
danger_zone.warning_subtitle: Make sure you have exported all necessary information before continuing.
danger_zone.alert_description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
danger_zone.error_sole_owner: Unable to delete your account. You are the sole owner of these organizations: "{orgNames}". Please transfer ownership or delete these organizations before deleting your account.

invitations.page_description: List of invitations sent to your account.

image_upload.cropper_description: Move the image to adjust the framing.

subscription.plan_not_configured: No plan is configured at the moment
subscription.members_total_notice: {count, plural, =0 {Your organization has no members.} =1 {Your organization has 1 member.} other {Your organization has # members.}} The total due will be:

subscription.members_removed: {count, plural, =1 {1 member removed} other {# members removed}}
subscription.members_removed_note: Details of removed members are not available in the history
subscription.licenses_added: {count, plural, =1 {1 license added} other {# licenses added}}
subscription.licenses_removed: {count, plural, =1 {1 license removed} other {# licenses removed}}

subscription.no_movements: No changes since the last invoice

subscription.license_amounts_detail: {count, plural, =1 {Per license amount: {amounts}} other {Per license amounts: {amounts}}}

subscription.pack_selector_description: Each pack adds {limit} units to your usage limit

manage.name_description: This name is visible to all members.
manage.select_org_message: Select an organization from the sidebar to edit its information.

image_upload.cropper_description: Move the image to adjust the framing.

danger_zone.card_description: Deleting an organization is irreversible. All members will lose access to associated data. Enter the organization's name to confirm.
danger_zone.warning_title: This action is final and will delete all data for organization "{name}".
danger_zone.warning_subtitle: Make sure you have exported all necessary information before continuing.
danger_zone.subscription_warning_description: This organization has an active subscription. You must first cancel your subscription from the subscription management page before you can delete the organization.
danger_zone.alert_description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete organization "{name}" and all associated data.

leave.dialog_description: Are you sure you want to leave the organization {orgName}? You will lose access to all its data.
leave.error_sole_owner: You cannot leave this organization because you are the sole owner. Transfer ownership to another member first.

members.page_description: Manage active members of your organization, their roles and permissions.
members.invit_members: Invite members to join your organization.

members.remove_dialog_description: This action will revoke {name}'s access to the organization.
members.remove_dialog_description_fallback: This action will revoke the member's access to the organization.

invitations.remove_dialog_description_fallback: This action will cancel this invitation.
